item.drop.1: * You bid a quiet farewell&  to the {insert ITEM}.
item.drop.2: * You put the {insert ITEM}&  on the ground and gave it a&  little pat.
item.drop.3: * You threw the {insert ITEM}&  on the ground like the piece&  of trash it is.
item.stick.name: Stick
item.stick.info: * Stick - Weapon AT 0&* Its bark is worse than&  its bite.
item.stick.use: * You threw the stick away.{sleep 20}&* Then picked it back up.
item.bandage.name: Bandage
item.bandage.info: * Bandage - Heals 10 HP&* It has already been used&  several times.
item.toy_knife.name: Toy Knife
item.toy_knife.info: * Toy Knife - Weapon AT 3&* Made of plastic.&* A rarity nowadays.
item.faded_ribbon.name: Faded Ribbon
item.faded_ribbon.info: * Faded Ribbon - Armor DF 3&* If you're cuter,{sleep 20} monsters&  won't hit you as hard.
item.tough_glove.name: Tough Glove
item.tough_glove.info: * Tough Glove - Weapon AT 5&* A worn pink leather glove. &* For five-fingered folk.
item.burnt_pan.name: Burnt Pan
item.burnt_pan.info: * Burnt Pan - Weapon AT 10&* Damage is rather consistent.&* Consumable items heal 4 more HP.
item.shoes.name: BallShoes
item.shoes.info: * Ballet Shoes - Weapon AT 7&* These used shoes make you feel&  incredibly dangerous.
item.notebook.name: Torn Notebook
item.notebook.info: * Torn Notebook - Weapon AT 2&* Contains illegible scrawls.&* Increases INV by 6.
item.gun.name: Empty Gun
item.gun.info: * Empty Gun - Weapon AT 12&* An antique revolver.&* It has no ammo.{pause}{clear}* Must be used precisely, or &  damage will be low.
item.dagger.name: Worn Dagger
item.dagger.info: * Worn Dagger - Weapon AT 15&* Perfect for cutting plants&  and vines.
item.real_knife.name: Real Knife
item.cowboyhat.name: Cowboy Hat
item.cowboyhat.info: * Cowboy Hat - Armor DF 12&* This battle-worn hat makes&  you want to grow a beard.{pause}{clear}* It also raises attack by 5.
item.tutu.name: Old Tutu
item.tutu.info: * Old Tutu - Armor DF 10&* Finally, a protective piece of&  armor.
item.mandanna.name: Manly Bandanna
item.mandanna.info: * Manly Bandanna - Armor DF 7&* It has seen some wear.&* It has abs drawn on it.
item.glasses.name: Cloudy Glasses
item.glasses.info: * Cloudy Glasses - Armor DF 5&* Glasses marred with wear.&* Increases INV by 9.
item.apron.name: Stained Apron
item.apron.info: * Stained Apron - Armor DF 11&* Heals 1 HP every other turn.
